rulings.Case Title: HENRY DEGUZMAN CRUZ et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT SC PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny. Failed to shift the burden. No competent evidence plaintiff's payments under the repayment plan were late. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY DEGUZMAN CRUZ et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny. Failed to shift the burden. No competent evidence to show 1) Payment due date unclear, repayment plan letter was the 28th and 2) Plaintiff's failed to comply with repayment plan. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MESHA MONGE-IRIZARRY VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of The Bank Of New York Mellon
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2012, line 6. Demurrer Of The Bank Of New York Mellon. Sustain with leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUEY QUON SIU et al VS. MAUREEN MCCLENDON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside The Stipulation For Settlement And Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT MAUREEN MCCLENDON's Motion To Set Aside The Stipulation For Settlement And Entry Of Judgment. Deny - failed to sustain burden. Contrary to moving party's assertions, agreement result of prolonged settlement i.e. mandatory settlement conference prior week. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA N.A. VS. JOHN TAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 18, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT ARNOLD SIN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS and Vacate Judgment. Deny Motion to Quash, proper service. Grant Motion to Set Aside. Answer to be filed forthwith. Future rent to be posted with the court. = (501/REQ)
